notes: Minimal witness dataset manually constructed for PostgreSQL and MySQL validation
PostgreSQL source.sql returned 1.5 on the witness dataset
MySQL rewrite_pos_01.sql returned 1.5 on the witness dataset
MySQL rewrite_neg_01.sql returned 1 on the witness dataset
The negative rewrite uses inclusive end-of-year range bounds and drops late-day records such as 2010-12-31 23:59:59
